headline: AWS Community Hero | Chicago AWS user group leader
summary: I bring hands-on expertise in AWS, cloud migrations, and stakeholder communications. I’ve led Agile and DevOps transformations for large and small teams. I am proud to organize the Chicago AWS user group and AWS Community Day Midwest, a user-run conference for over 400 attendees. I can easily translate ambiguous requirements into actionable milestones, align stakeholders across disciplines, and deliver measurable impact. I’ve also presented at AWS re:Invent, the Chicago AWS Summit, and community events—demonstrating my ability to communicate complex technical concepts with clarity and enthusiasm. AWS Community Day | Midwest Founder and Organizer AWS Community Day | Midwest is an annual one-day, technical conference run for the user community, by the AWS user community. The event has grown from grassroots meetups to a full-scale conference, rotating through Chicago, Columbus, Milwaukee, and now Indy. This work reflects my commitment to building inclusive, high-impact spaces where cloud professionals can connect, learn, and grow. Join us: https://www.midwestcommunityday.com Chicago AWS User Group leader Since 2013 I've been connecting the AWS community in Chicago via events and programs. The Chicago AWS Tech community continues to grow and evolve! Join us: https://www.meetup.com/aws-chicago
